long_description:
[API]-Unusual request latency for Regional Extension Server [SAO] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://test-runbook.com
TIP Situation:                      Observed Regional-extension-server pod request latency below 95% threshold (0.8s). issue in unusual-request-latency-for-regional-extension-server
TIP Short Description:              Monitors regional-extension-server pods and alerts if fewer than 95% of HTTP requests complete within 0.8s over 5 minutes
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-apis:br-sao::mzone2t7:pod:sao1-qz1-sr2-rk146-s05

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver",le="0.8"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) / sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_count{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) < 0.95 = 0.85
Segment:
    host_hostname = 'sao1-qz1-sr2-rk146-s05' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2t7' and kube_pod_name = 'genctl-extension-server-695cc795b5-ckbjh'

Time:                12/08/2025 12:16 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [API]-Unusual request latency for Regional Extension Server [SAO]
Description:    Monitors regional-extension-server pods and alerts if fewer than 95% of HTTP requests complete within 0.8s over 5 minutes
Team:           is-apis
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver",le="0.8"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) / sum(rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_count{kube_namespace="genctl",kube_deployment_name=~"genctl-extension-server",component="apiserver"}[5m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,host_hostname) < 0.95
Duration:       1m
Alert URL:      https://opsdashboard.w3.cloud.ibm.com/graphs/alerting/obs-metrics-br-sao/%5BAPI%5D-Unusual%20request%20latency%20for%20Regional%20Extension%20Server%20%5BSAO%5D/find
